# KelvinY's Website
My personal website built with HTML, CSS, and Vanilla JavaScript, to showcase my coding journey and skills.

## Navigation
- [About Me](https://kelviny.pages.dev/#about-me) - A brief introduction to who I am.
- [Timeline](https://kelviny.pages.dev/#timeline) - My coding journey from writing my first line of code to diving into web development.
- [Experience](https://kelviny.pages.dev/#experience) - A showcase of my frontend tech stack with visual proficiency bars.
- [AI Chat](https://kelviny.pages.dev/chat) - An interactive chatbot powered by structured system prompts, acting as a digital version of myself.

## Socials
- [GitHub Profile](https://github.com/kelvinyhf)
- [CodePen Profile](https://codepen.io/kelvinyhf)
- [Discord Profile](https://discord.com/users/1083677178669039706)
